# UX Checklist: Provide Health Checks and Service Metrics

**Purpose**: Validate any monitoring dashboard UI surfaces.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/031-health-service-metrics/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Dashboard Visibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-001 Health status summary shows overall status and dependencies. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-31.
- [ ] CHK-UX-002 Metrics panels show request/error counts and latency. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-31.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-003 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Health", "Dependencies", "Metrics"). Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-31.
- [ ] CHK-UX-004 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate. Note: Not necessary for core spec; no required UI.
